scripts.test:llm-judge-evals: ts-node test/test.llm-judge-alignment.ts data/judge-alignment-dataset.jsonc && ts-node test/test.llm-judge-alignment-bootstrap.ts data/judge-alignment-dataset.jsonc && ts-node test/test.llm-judge-consistency.ts && npx ts-node test/test.llm-judge-alignment.ts data/judge-alignment-dataset-final-exam.jsonc
scripts.test:llm-judge-evals-basic: ts-node test/test.llm-judge-alignment-basic.ts data/judge-alignment-dataset.jsonc && ts-node test/test.llm-judge-alignment-bootstrap-basic.ts data/judge-alignment-dataset.jsonc && ts-node test/test.llm-judge-consistency.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit-evals && npm run test:rule-based-evals && npm run test:llm-judge-evals && npm run test:llm-judge-evals-basic
scripts.test:all-fast: npm run test:unit-evals-fast && npm run test:rule-based-evals && npm run test:llm-judge-evals-fast && npm run test:llm-judge-evals-basic-fast
